data.name: Text_0
data.value: Aye! Is there anything you need?

data.name: Text_1
data.value: Hello! I am Pasi the Mage. Hahaha! Hmmm... The movement of the stars doesn't seem quite right. Your future... Hmm... I can't see your future either... Why's that...?

data.name: Text_2
data.value: Hello! My name is Baz and I am the vault keeper. I can be of help to you wherever you go. Don't hesitate to leave your belongings with me.

data.name: Text_3
data.value: Many adventurers have told me that the sound of the harp soothes and wipes away their fatigue. Do you need my help?

data.name: Text_4
data.value: Hello! My name is Baz and I am the vault keeper. I can be of help to you wherever you go. Don't hesitate to leave your belongings with me.

data.name: Text_5
data.value: Have you brought enough money? Without it, I can't combine the items because I need money to continue with my research. Understood? Do you want to know how much money is needed?

data.name: Text_6
data.value: Welcome to MU! Press the F1 key if you need any assistance while traveling around the MU continent.

data.name: Text_7
data.value: Is it your first time in Lorencia? Go to the southeast exit in front of the fountain and try to hunt Budge Dragons or Spiders. The Skeletons in Northwest are too dangerous.

data.name: Text_8
data.value: Welcome to Noria. If it's your first time, pass through the vault guard and go to the south exit. Try to hunt low level monsters like Scorpions or Goblins.

data.name: Text_9
data.value: If you need a detailed guide of the MU continent check out http://muonline.webzen.net

data.name: Text_50
data.value: The 'Scroll of the Emperor', which speaks of Muren, the first emperor of MU, is said to have been seen around the Lost Tower, Atlans, and the Dungeon.

data.name: Answer_50_Slot_0
data.value: I didn't know such a thing existed...

data.name: Text_51
data.value: Your offering to God isn't enough. I will tell you about the oracle if you make an offering of 1,000,000 Zen.

data.name: Answer_51_Slot_0
data.value: I shall return with 1,000,000 Zen.

data.name: Text_52
data.value: The 'Scroll of the Emperor', which speaks of Muren, the first emperor to unify MU, is said to have been seen around the Lost Tower, Atlans, and the Dungeon.

data.name: Answer_52_Slot_0
data.value: Tell me more.

data.name: Text_53
data.value: The 'Scroll of the Emperor' is enwrapped in a powerful force. Anyone who reads it shall be blessed with that powerful force.

data.name: Answer_53_Slot_0
data.value: Please repeat the story.

data.name: Answer_53_Slot_1
data.value: I will go find it.

data.name: Answer_53_Slot_2
data.value: I don't care.

data.name: Text_54
data.value: Go find the 'Scroll of the Emperor'. You will be granted with great power upon reading it.

data.name: Answer_54_Slot_0
data.value: I will go find it.

data.name: Text_55
data.value: You've found the 'Scroll of the Emperor'! The commemoration of unification of the Mu Empire's first emperor Muren was recorded with the power of magic here, you see. The one who possesses the 'Scroll of the Emperor' is granted with great power.

data.name: Answer_55_Slot_0
data.value: Tell me about the record.

data.name: Text_56
data.value: A historical record of the first emperor Muren contains the commemoration of peace through the triumph of Muren over all warlords and by doing so, unified the continent into the Empire or MU.

data.name: Answer_56_Slot_0
data.value: Please continue.

data.name: Text_57
data.value: Muren was one of the three heroes that ended the chaos brought upon the people by Sekneum's invasion.

data.name: Answer_57_Slot_0
data.value: Tell me the previous story.

data.name: Answer_57_Slot_1
data.value: Please continue.

data.name: Text_58
data.value: Magical artifacts may be found and they are called the 'Broken Sword', 'Tear of Elf', and the 'Soul of Wizard'. The 'Broken Sword' was offered by the dark knights as a symbol of their bravery, loyalty and their wish for prosperity.

data.name: Answer_58_Slot_0
data.value: Tell me the previous story.

data.name: Answer_58_Slot_1
data.value: Please continue.

data.name: Text_59
data.value: The 'Soul of Wizard' was offered by the dark wizards as a symbol of their vow to use their power for the peace and freedom of the empire. Mu Year 10, an excerpt of the commemoration of peace record...

data.name: Answer_59_Slot_0
data.value: Tell me the previous story.

data.name: Answer_59_Slot_1
data.value: That's what happened...

data.name: Text_60
data.value: If you've read the 'Scroll of the Emperor', seek out the 'Broken Sword' that the ancient dark knights used at the commemoration of peace. From what I've heard, a few dark knights have found it in Atlans, the Lost Tower and Tarkan.

data.name: Answer_60_Slot_0
data.value: I will find it.

data.name: Answer_60_Slot_1
data.value: I give up.

data.name: Text_61
data.value: Danger lurks behind every corner in those places and the 'Broken Sword' is not easily spotted. But if you find it, new power will be bestowed upon you! Return to me once you find the 'Broken Sword'.

data.name: Answer_61_Slot_0
data.value: I shall find and return with it.

data.name: Text_62
data.value: Brave dark knight, you've found the 'Broken Sword'! After the unification of the Mu Continent, Muren, the first emperor, broke his sword 'Apocalypse' as a symbol of his wish that no war ever erupts again.

data.name: Answer_62_Slot_0
data.value: Tell me more.

data.name: Text_63
data.value: After the War, dark knights who wished to become blade knights started seeking the ancient 'Broken Sword' in order to prove their bravery.

data.name: Answer_63_Slot_0
data.value: That's what happened!

data.name: Text_64
data.value: You've read the 'Scroll of the Emperor', haven't you. Then you must know about the 3 treasures recorded in the 'Scroll of the Emperor'. Go find the crystal 'Tear of Elf' made by the ancient elves with the strength of the spirit.

data.name: Answer_64_Slot_0
data.value: Please tell me more.

data.name: Text_65
data.value: That place is a very dangerous place and the 'Tear of Elf' is extremely hard to find. But if you find the 'Tear of Elf', new power will be bestowed upon you. Now, go find the 'Tear of Elf' and return to me.

data.name: Answer_65_Slot_0
data.value: I will go find the 'Tear of Elf'!

data.name: Text_66
data.value: You've found the 'Tear of Elf'! After the War, Lunedil, the elf queen, created the tear stone by casting magic on the spirit stone so that elves could invoke the goddess' power and build their power.

data.name: Answer_66_Slot_0
data.value: Please continue.

data.name: Text_67
data.value: You've read the 'Scroll of the Emperor', haven't you. Then you must know about the 3 treasures recorded in it.

data.name: Answer_67_Slot_0
data.value: Please continue.

data.name: Text_68
data.value: With your power, I am sure that you will find the 'Soul of Wizard'. Now go find the 'Soul of Wizard' and return to me once you've found it.

data.name: Answer_68_Slot_0
data.value: I'm going to find the 'Soul of Wizard'.

data.name: Text_69
data.value: I knew you'd find the 'Soul of Wizard'! Etramu, the greatest wizard of Arka, created a soul-protecting magic stone, worried that the weak dark knights might falter at the attack of Kundun.

data.name: Answer_69_Slot_0
data.value: Please tell me more.

data.name: Text_70
data.value: A dark wizard with this magic stone becomes a soul master.

data.name: Answer_70_Slot_0
data.value: I am now a soul master!

data.name: Text_71
data.value: Your offering to God isn't enough. I will tell you about the oracle if you make an offering of 2,000,000 Zen.

data.name: Answer_71_Slot_0
data.value: I shall return with 2,000,000 Zen.

data.name: Text_72
data.value: New power has been bestowed upon you as a result of your strong will and strength. May the grace of Lugard be with you at all times.

data.name: Answer_72_Slot_0
data.value: May the grace of God be with you...

data.name: Text_73
data.value: You already possess great power. I do not have an oracle for you.

data.name: Answer_73_Slot_0
data.value: I will return later.

data.name: Text_74
data.value: Return after you've become stronger.

data.name: Answer_74_Slot_0
data.value: I shall return when I'm stronger.

data.name: Text_75
data.value: If you've developed into a strong warrior, you will be able to find it.

data.name: Answer_75_Slot_0
data.value: Please continue.

data.name: Text_76
data.value: From then on, a custom was born where dark knights who wished to become blade knights broke their swords as a symbol of their vow to never wield their swords unjustly.

data.name: Answer_76_Slot_0
data.value: Tell me more.

data.name: Text_77
data.value: Some of the adventurous elves have said that they were seen in the Lost Tower, Atlans and Tarkan.

data.name: Answer_77_Slot_0
data.value: 'I will go find it!

data.name: Answer_77_Slot_1
data.value: I do not wish to go to such a place.

data.name: Text_78
data.value: This is called the 'Tear of Elf', and the elf that finds this stone becomes a muse elf, able to conjure the power of the elven Goddesses.

data.name: Answer_78_Slot_0
data.value: I've become a muse elf!

data.name: Text_79
data.value: Since you have found both the 'Scroll of the Emperor' and the 'Broken Sword', you will be called a blade knight from now on.

data.name: Answer_79_Slot_0
data.value: I've become a Blade Knight!

data.name: Text_80
data.value: After the empire was united, people swore loyalty to the emperor. Some of the treasures offered as a symbol of their loyalty are as follows.

data.name: Answer_80_Slot_0
data.value: Tell me the previous story.

data.name: Answer_80_Slot_1
data.value: Please continue.

data.name: Text_81
data.value: The 'Tear of Elf' was offered by the elves as a token of their vow to strengthen the power of elves and humans.

data.name: Answer_81_Slot_0
data.value: Tell me the previous story.

data.name: Answer_81_Slot_1
data.value: Please continue.

data.name: Text_82
data.value: Go find the 'Soul of Wizard'. According to the ancient dark wizards, it was last seen around the Lost Tower, Atlans and Tarkan.

data.name: Answer_82_Slot_0
data.value: I will go find the it

data.name: Answer_82_Slot_1
data.value: I will return later.

data.name: Text_90
data.value: You've finished reading the 'Decree of the Emperor'. But do you know about the confidential contract between Muren and Semeden the leader summoner? Muren was promised of one thing instead of transferring Elbe to be under the empire.

data.name: Answer_90_Slot_0
data.value: Continue listening.

data.name: Text_91
data.value: The Continent of MU had the gate of a dimension of the world under the supervision of the summoners. And Semeden had given the Abyss of Eye as a token of promise. Please go and bring back the Abyss of Eye.

data.name: Answer_91_Slot_0
data.value: Accept the request

data.name: Answer_91_Slot_1
data.value: Deny the request

data.name: Text_92
data.value: I've heard that the Abyss of Eye was found around Atlance, Lost Tower and Tarkan. Come back with the Abyss of Eye as soon as you find it.

data.name: Answer_92_Slot_0
data.value: Finish telling the story

data.name: Text_93
data.value: You've found the Abyss of Eye. This has been known as an object composed of the element inexistent in the real world. It's contagious from the world prior to the present, which the memory returns along with it.

data.name: Answer_93_Slot_0
data.value: Continue listening.

data.name: Text_94
data.value: Abyss of Eye holds a special meaning for me as I supervise and communicate through the dimensions of this world. If you bring back the Abyss of Eye, I will give you the Blood Summoner title for Semeden the supervisor of your dimension.

data.name: Answer_94_Slot_0
data.value: Imposition as the Blood Summoner

data.name: Text_100
data.value: The legendary treasure called 'Ring of Glory' is needed to acquire the blessing and strength of Muren. It has manifested its presence once more within our lands. But you are not ready. Wait until you are more experienced.

data.name: Answer_100_Slot_0
data.value: Then what do I need to do?

data.name: Text_101
data.value: More experience is required to survive this Quest. Return when you have gained up too 220 levels according to the trials of the lost empire.

data.name: Answer_101_Slot_0
data.value: I will return when my time has come.

data.name: Text_102
data.value: The legendary treasure called 'Ring of Glory' is needed to acquire the blessing and strength of Muren. It has manifested its presence once more within our lands.

data.name: Answer_102_Slot_0
data.value: I wish to hear more.

data.name: Text_103
data.value: Whoever possesses the 'Ring of Glory' gains the blessing of Muren. It is said to be found in the deserts across the sea.

data.name: Answer_103_Slot_0
data.value: Why is that?

data.name: Text_104
data.value: The monsters there are quite powerful. They posses the ring.

data.name: Answer_104_Slot_0
data.value: Please repeat the story.

data.name: Answer_104_Slot_1
data.value: I shall try.

data.name: Answer_104_Slot_2
data.value: I'm not ready yet.

data.name: Text_105
data.value: The 'Ring of Glory' may be in a place closer than you think. When you acquire it, you will definitely feel a change in your power. But it won't be an easy task.

data.name: Answer_105_Slot_0
data.value: I will return with it.

data.name: Text_108
data.value: This is indeed the 'Ring of Glory.' It glows with a mystical aura, more so than I imagined. This ring possesses a legend that you cannot even fathom. It is a true blessing in your hands.

data.name: Answer_108_Slot_0
data.value: I see.

data.name: Text_109
data.value: This ring is said to revive life and grant perpetual youth. But it only works on heroes that possess the power to wield its strength.

data.name: Answer_109_Slot_0
data.value: Why's that?

data.name: Text_110
data.value: It's because Etramu, the Wizard of Arka, cast a spell in order to prevent the evil from taking advantage of it. But the ring says you are fit for it.

data.name: Answer_110_Slot_0
data.value: Is that so?

data.name: Text_111
data.value: The 'Ring of Glory' was created when the prophecy Secromicon was created with an imperishable metal. The two have been considered sacred, but the whereabouts became unknown when it was taken during the revolt of the deputy commander Gaion.

data.name: Answer_111_Slot_0
data.value: Is that so?!

data.name: Text_112
data.value: Now that the 'Ring of Glory' has been found, you will be able to grow even more as a warrior.

data.name: Answer_112_Slot_0
data.value: I feel my ability increasing!

data.name: Text_113
data.value: You will grow into a being far greater than before. Please use your power for the peace of our empire.

data.name: Answer_113_Slot_0
data.value: I will.

data.name: Text_114
data.value: You already possess the sacred power.

data.name: Answer_114_Slot_0
data.value: I will return later.

data.name: Text_115
data.value: The 'Dark Stone' that is said to give warriors new power was found on the continent of Mu. However, you are not ready to use that power. Wait till you are ready.

data.name: Answer_115_Slot_0
data.value: I will return when I am ready.

data.name: Text_116
data.value: In order to acquire the full power, you need to prepare yourself with the 'Scroll of the Emperor' which records the historical facts of Emperor Muren. Go to 'Sevina' in Devias.

data.name: Answer_116_Slot_0
data.value: I will return when I am ready.

data.name: Text_117
data.value: You have failed to become a Blade Knight. Return after you have acquired new power through the 'Ring of Glory.

data.name: Answer_117_Slot_0
data.value: I will return when I am ready.

data.name: Text_118
data.value: You must offer 3,000,000 zen to the Gods to sanctify this quest. Your zen is not enough

data.name: Answer_118_Slot_0
data.value: I will return with 3,000,000 Zen.

data.name: Text_119
data.value: Your offering to God isn't enough. I will tell you about the oracle if you make an offering of 2,000,000 Zen.

data.name: Answer_119_Slot_0
data.value: I will return with 2,000,000 Zen

data.name: Text_130
data.value: It indeed is the 'Ring of Glory'. Look at how it shines. This ring contains time and legend that you cannot even begin to fathom. It's a blessing that you have found it!.

data.name: Answer_130_Slot_0
data.value: I'm surprised to hear that!

data.name: Text_131
data.value: Yes, the ring is said to have the power to bring life to the dead and grant perpetual youth. It will only perform its best when it is in the hands of a true hero that can control the ring's power.

data.name: Answer_131_Slot_0
data.value: Why is that so?

data.name: Text_132
data.value: It is because Etramu, the Wizard of Arka, put a spell on it so that it doesn't fall into the hands of the wrong people. But it seems as though you are the right person!

data.name: Answer_132_Slot_0
data.value: Is that so!

data.name: Text_133
data.value: The 'Ring of Glory' was created when the prophecy Secromicon was created with an imperishable metal. The two have been considered sacred, but the whereabouts became unknown when it was taken during the revolt of the deputy commander Gaion.

data.name: Answer_133_Slot_0
data.value: Is that so!

data.name: Text_134
data.value: Now that the 'Ring of Glory' has been found, you will be able to grow even more as a warrior.

data.name: Answer_134_Slot_0
data.value: I feel my ability increasing!

data.name: Text_135
data.value: If you would like to acquire new power, listen to me carefully. The 'Dark Stone' that is said to give warriors new power was found on the continent of Mu.

data.name: Answer_135_Slot_0
data.value: I would like to hear more.

data.name: Text_136
data.value: With the 'Dark Stone', you can master a new ability. It won't be an easy task, but since you were able to acquire the 'Ring of Glory' it might be possible for you.

data.name: Answer_136_Slot_0
data.value: What do I need to do?

data.name: Text_137
data.value: Rumor has it that you can find the stone in Tarkan and Icarus. Be careful of the monsters. Those monsters that possess the stone will only react to those who have a special ability.

data.name: Answer_137_Slot_0
data.value: Please repeat the story again.

data.name: Answer_137_Slot_1
data.value: Then I shall try!

data.name: Answer_137_Slot_2
data.value: I do not feel confident yet.

data.name: Text_138
data.value: The 'Dark Stone' is calling on you right now. With it in hand, you will surely acquire power that you have never felt before, but many other warriors are desperately in search of the stone as well.

data.name: Answer_138_Slot_0
data.value: I shall return with the 'Dark Stone'.

data.name: Text_139
data.value: So you've found the 'Dark Stone. It is recorded that this stone is the dried up blood of the hero 'Benelope' who fought in the War of the Gods and Satan.

data.name: Answer_139_Slot_0
data.value: Tell me more.

data.name: Text_140
data.value: Benelope is of a knight descent. After his defeat in the War, he trained for new magic and fighting skills. These skills have been silently initiated to warriors with the blood of a knight in order to fight against the powerful force of Kundun.

data.name: Answer_140_Slot_0
data.value: So...

data.name: Text_141
data.value: Yes, the blood of a warrior runs through you. Thus, the power of Benelope will be granted to you through the Dark Stone.

data.name: Answer_141_Slot_0
data.value: I have been granted new power!

data.name: Text_142
data.value: You have acquired new power through the 'Ring of Glory'. But there is something that you don't know.

data.name: Answer_142_Slot_0
data.value: What is that?

data.name: Text_143
data.value: It is possible that you might be able to acquire new power. The legendary treasure called 'Dark Stone', which was considered sacred along with the 'Ring of Glory', is calling on you.

data.name: Answer_143_Slot_0
data.value: That is hard to believe!

data.name: Text_144
data.value: Lugard the God of Light has requested a favor of you. However, you're still not qualified. I suggest you come back when you've become stronger.

data.name: Answer_144_Slot_0
data.value: I'll be back when I'm stronger.

data.name: Text_145
data.value: Lugard the God of Light has requested a favor of you. However, you're still not qualified. Please come back when you've completed the previous quest.

data.name: Answer_145_Slot_0
data.value: I'll come back when I've completed it.

data.name: Text_146
data.value: You do not have enough Zen. You may apply for this mission by offering 5,000,000 Zen to Lugard.

data.name: Answer_146_Slot_0
data.value: I'll come back when I am ready.

data.name: Text_147
data.value: Lugard the God of Light has requested a favor of you.

data.name: Answer_147_Slot_0
data.value: What is it?

data.name: Text_148
data.value: Lugard has asked you to seek heroes to oppose Balgass' new threat to MU.

data.name: Answer_148_Slot_0
data.value: Continue listening.

data.name: Text_149
data.value: We understand that Balgass' army's coming against the Continent of MU through the Cry Wolf Fortress, but there has not been an exact interpretation of the whole story.

data.name: Answer_149_Slot_0
data.value: Continue listening.

data.name: Text_150
data.value: We're trying hard to understand the meaning of Lugar's trust towards us, but we still struggle to due to our inadequate ability.

data.name: Answer_150_Slot_0
data.value: Continue listening.

data.name: Text_151
data.value: I believe you are the people to offer us help. Are you interested in working with us?

data.name: Answer_151_Slot_0
data.value: Listen again.

data.name: Answer_151_Slot_1
data.value: Accept the request

data.name: Answer_151_Slot_2
data.value: Deny the request

data.name: Text_152
data.value: In order for you to help us, you must oppose Balgass' army. Before you begin, I need to check if you're adequately powerful for the mission.

data.name: Answer_152_Slot_0
data.value: Continue listening.

data.name: Text_153
data.value: Destroy Death Beam, Hellmaine and Dark Phoenix monsters which dominate over Tarkan, Aida and Icarus and bring back 3 pieces of evidence accordingly.

data.name: Answer_153_Slot_0
data.value: Finish telling the story

data.name: Text_154
data.value: Congratulations, you've completed the duty. Here's a small something for your hard work.

data.name: Answer_154_Slot_0
data.value: Continue listening.

data.name: Text_155
data.value: Balgass is a great threat as he is since he's in cooperation with Eresia the Queen of Sorcery and has brought such danger into this world

data.name: Answer_155_Slot_0
data.value: Continue listening.

data.name: Text_156
data.value: We predict that Balgass is attempting a new threat against the Continent of MU with his army of evil sorcery.

data.name: Answer_156_Slot_0
data.value: Finish telling the story

data.name: Text_157
data.value: You don't have enough fund. Please offer 7,000,000 Zen to Lugard to apply for this mission.

data.name: Answer_157_Slot_0
data.value: I'll come back when I am ready.

data.name: Text_158
data.value: Welcome, you are truly ready to help us now.

data.name: Answer_158_Slot_0
data.value: What do you need help with?

data.name: Text_159
data.value: Well, according to our information Balgass has formed a locations called the Barracks. The 12 apostles of Lugard believe that this is a new threat from Balgass.

data.name: Answer_159_Slot_0
data.value: Continue listening.

data.name: Text_160
data.value: Exact information about the 'Barrack' drives one to enter the Barrack zone to diminish the threat of the further development of Balgass' army.

data.name: Answer_160_Slot_0
data.value: Continue listening.

data.name: Text_161
data.value: Fortunately Lugar's guardianship could help find the way to enter Balgass' Barrack. Enter the zone, destroy the soldiers and gain accurate information. Will you bring back the proper data accordingly?

data.name: Answer_161_Slot_0
data.value: Listen again.

data.name: Answer_161_Slot_1
data.value: Accept the request

data.name: Answer_161_Slot_2
data.value: Deny the request

data.name: Text_162
data.value: Go to the northern graveyard of Cry Wolf zone and find the soldier refuge from Balgass' Barrack. Lugar's blessing has caused one to have intelligence. He calls himself, Werewolf Guardsman.

data.name: Answer_162_Slot_0
data.value: Continue listening.

data.name: Text_163
data.value: He will lead you to Balgass' Barrack. Enter the zone and destroy minimum 10 monsters in the Barrack.

data.name: Answer_163_Slot_0
data.value: Finish telling the story

data.name: Text_164
data.value: You've safely completed the duty I appreciate your hard work and the strong will.

data.name: Answer_164_Slot_0
data.value: Continue talking.

data.name: Text_165
data.value: You have brought great help to build peace to the Continent of MU and Cry Wolf with the information and all the destroyed monsters.

data.name: Answer_165_Slot_0
data.value: Finish telling the story

data.name: Text_166
data.value: You are not qualified yet. Visit Security Guard Mallon, and come back when you are fully qualified for the mission.

data.name: Answer_166_Slot_0
data.value: Finish the story.

data.name: Text_167
data.value: You don't have enough fund. Please offer 10,000,000 Zen to Lugard to apply for this mission.

data.name: Answer_167_Slot_0
data.value: I'll come back when I am ready.

data.name: Text_168
data.value: Your initiative courage has shown a great hope to us all.

data.name: Answer_168_Slot_0
data.value: Continue listening.

data.name: Text_169
data.value: Balgass has hidden himself in a separate place to restore himself from the tiresome body.

data.name: Answer_169_Slot_0
data.value: Continue listening.

data.name: Text_170
data.value: In order to follow Lugar's entrusted mission, Balgass' exact location must be found and the army in training destroyed.

data.name: Answer_170_Slot_0
data.value: Continue listening.

data.name: Text_171
data.value: The final mission to follow after Lugar's mission includes a huge and difficult test. Are you still interested?

data.name: Answer_171_Slot_0
data.value: Listen again.

data.name: Answer_171_Slot_1
data.value: Accept the request

data.name: Answer_171_Slot_2
data.value: Deny the request

data.name: Text_172
data.value: Enter inside through the door at the northern edge of Balgass' Barrack; We will have the place ready beforehand.

data.name: Answer_172_Slot_0
data.value: Finish telling the story

data.name: Text_173
data.value: Congratulations, you've passed Lugar's final test. And now his blessing will be with you wherever you go.

data.name: Answer_173_Slot_0
data.value: Continue listening.

data.name: Text_174
data.value: Your hard work has paid off to keep peace in the Continent of MU and Cry Wolf from Balgass' new threat. I deeply appreciate your help.

data.name: Answer_174_Slot_0
data.value: Finish telling the story
